title: Glimmer
description:
Draw 3 cards.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Draw 4 cards.
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Player selects which card(s) to put on top of the Draw Pile via CardSelectCmd.FromHand selection screen.
